title: Sales Operations Analyst
description: State Farm is seeking a Sales Operations Analyst for our Minneapolis regional office. You'll optimize our sales processes, manage customer data, and support our insurance sales teams. Working onsite with a team dedicated to helping customers manage risk, you'll develop valuable expertise in insurance operations and sales management.
responsibilities: Manage customer databases and CRM systems; ensure data accuracy and integrity
Create sales reports and dashboards tracking pipeline, conversion, and performance metrics
Analyze sales data to identify trends and recommend process improvements
Coordinate sales training sessions and process documentation
Support sales team with commission calculations and incentive program management

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, or related field
skills: CRM system management (Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, or similar)
Strong Excel and data analysis capabilities
Understanding of insurance products or sales processes
Excellent attention to detail and organizational abilities

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
